penalties.description: Video does not show actual task performance - appears to be instructional content showing trainer construction rather than precision cutting execution

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed this video does not show actual precision cutting task performance. Claude identified it as instructional content showing trainer construction, while GPT noted the frames were too dark or missing relevant content. Either way, no scorable task execution is visible.

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete task results in automatic zero score, but penalty_deductions should reflect actual rule violations during task execution, not the absence of a task. The 300-point deduction appears to be a calculation error.

disagreements.claude_value: Cannot determine completion time or final state - video appears to be instructional content showing trainer construction rather than an actual task performance
disagreements.gpt_value: The video frames do not show evidence of task completion.
disagreements.rationale: Claude provided more specific detail about what the video actually contains, while GPT noted the absence of task content. The merged description captures both perspectives.
